summary: Voice Preview feature testing completed. All 8 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified: Preview Voice button (Play icon) visible on agent card, button changes to Pause icon when clicked, clicking again stops playback. ElevenLabs TTS integration working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Voice Preview feature is fully implemented and working correctly
previewAgentVoice function in App.js (lines 2242-2287) handles play/pause toggle correctly
Preview button uses data-testid='preview-voice-{agent_id}' for testing
Button shows Play icon (triangle) when idle, Pause icon (two bars) when playing
Button color changes from purple to green when playing
Backend POST /api/voices/preview endpoint (line 6065) generates audio via ElevenLabs TTS
Audio returned as base64 encoded data:audio/mpeg format
Text is truncated to 500 characters for preview
Voice Settings button still works alongside Preview button
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and Sarah Johnson agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice Preview feature fully tested. Backend endpoint at line 6065 in server.py. Frontend previewAgentVoice function at lines 2242-2287 in App.js. Key data-testids: preview-voice-{agent_id}, voice-settings-{agent_id}. ElevenLabs API key is configured and working. Sarah Johnson agent has preset_voice_id='AZnzlk1XvdvUeBnXmlld'.
